title: SEIU Local 509 — Public Sector Commonwealth Contract (2024-2026)
description: Scraped Markdown of the SEIU Local 509 'Public Sector Commonwealth Contract' page. Identifies the collective bargaining agreement covering the Public Sector with the Commonwealth of Massachusetts as employer, effective 01/01/2024 through 12/31/2026, and links to the signed, searchable CBA PDF (2024-2026 state CBA, signed 08/01/2024). This is the governing state-worker contract for SEIU 509 public-sector members, including DDS examiners.
notes: Authoritative: official SEIU Local 509 union content scraped from seiu509.org. The page itself is a short contract index card; the actual CBA text lives in the linked PDF (2024-2026-state-cba-signed-08012024-searchable.pdf) which is NOT in this repo. temporal_coverage reflects the stated contract effective dates (2024-01-01 to 2026-12-31). Leading/trailing boilerplate are cookie-consent and gtranslate chrome.
